name: O.R.C. Cricket
description: The O.R.C. Cricket is the controlled version of Brookhollow's cricket. It keeps its mobility, jumps, and frontal hits, but now commits to combat with far more oppressive persistence.
behavior: It patrols greenhouses and O.R.C. wave zones with a lot of lateral movement and long jumps. Even when it looks like it is backing off, it is usually searching for the angle to crash back in.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks on sight and especially punishes anyone who reads its jumps and headbutts poorly. React late to the long leap and you are forced back into defense before you can reset position.
interactionWithCreatures: It often serves as a mobile harasser inside O.R.C. formations, jumping in and out to keep the fight's rhythm broken.
strategy: Fresh and busting damage are still the best route. Punish the end of the headbutt and long leap, but do not linger behind it because the back kick is still a very reliable punish.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Hit Combo Bite: 110. Charged Headbutt: 140. Back Kick: 119. Leap of Faith: 150.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo Bite
abilities.description: It chains a quick string of bites to keep you from recovering tempo.

abilities.name: Charged Headbutt
abilities.description: It winds up briefly and then smashes forward with much more force.

abilities.name: Back Kick
abilities.description: It kicks backward to punish anyone staying behind it for too long.

abilities.name: Leap of Faith
abilities.description: It takes a long aggressive leap to land on top of the target and seize the initiative again.
